title: Noise
tmdbOverview: Ju-young is a young woman with a hearing impediment who decides to investigate her sister's inexplicable disappearance, last seen in her apartment. Feeling more and more cornered, Ju-young begins to hear strange sounds and sense an evil presence in the apartment.
synopsis: Noise (2025) is a horror and thriller film from South Korea. It carries a 6.8 rating on TMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a +13 certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
